1.text:
Define Artificial Intelligence? (2 marks)
Artificial Intelligence (AI) is when machines are made to think and learn like
humans. Al uses algorithms to help computers perform tasts ouch as recognizing
speech, playing games, or solving problems. However, Al can sometimes
make mistakes.
They produce zero emissions, helping to reduce air pollution.

2.text:
Write an essay on global warming. (5 marks)
Global warming means Earth's temperature is rising because of too much carbon
dioxide (COz) and other greenhouse gases. These gases come from cars,
factories, and deforestation. Global warming causes ice caps to melt, sefieme
sea levels to rise, and weather events like hurricanes to get worse. We can
help by using renewablle energy like solar and wind, and by reducing waste
to slow down emíssions. If we don't act, our planet will face extreme heat, fluoding,
and damage to ecosystems.
EVs are cheaper to run than gasaline cars because electricty cass than fuel

3.text:
List the advantages of EVs. (4 marks)
Electric vehicles (EVs) have many advantages:
EVs require less maintenance because they have fewer moving parts.

aligned_pairs.student_text:
Define Artificial Intelligence? (2 marks)
Artificial Intelligence (AI) is when machines are made to think and learn like
humans. Al uses algorithms to help computers perform tasts ouch as recognizing
speech, playing games, or solving problems. However, Al can sometimes
make mistakes.
They produce zero emissions, helping to reduce air pollution.
aligned_pairs.model_text:
Ans 1:
Artificial Intelligence (AI) refers to the ability of machines to simulate human intelligence. It enables computers to perform tasks such as learning, reasoning, problem-solving, and decision-making using algorithms and data.

aligned_pairs.student_text:
Write an essay on global warming. (5 marks)
Global warming means Earth's temperature is rising because of too much carbon
dioxide (COz) and other greenhouse gases. These gases come from cars,
factories, and deforestation. Global warming causes ice caps to melt, sefieme
sea levels to rise, and weather events like hurricanes to get worse. We can
help by using renewablle energy like solar and wind, and by reducing waste
to slow down emíssions. If we don't act, our planet will face extreme heat, fluoding,
and damage to ecosystems.
EVs are cheaper to run than gasaline cars because electricty cass than fuel
aligned_pairs.model_text:
Ans 2:
Global warming is the gradual increase in the Earth’s average temperature due to the excessive emission of greenhouse gases such as carbon dioxide (CO₂) and methane. These gases are released from human activities like burning fossil fuels, deforestation, and industrial processes.

The rise in global temperatures leads to melting of polar ice caps, rising sea levels, and extreme weather conditions such as floods, droughts, and hurricanes. It also negatively affects biodiversity and ecosystems.

To control global warming, it is important to adopt renewable energy sources like solar and wind energy, reduce carbon emissions, and promote sustainable practices such as afforestation and energy conservation. Immediate action is necessary to protect the environment for future generations.

aligned_pairs.student_text:
List the advantages of EVs. (4 marks)
Electric vehicles (EVs) have many advantages:
EVs require less maintenance because they have fewer moving parts.
aligned_pairs.model_text:
Ans 3:
Electric Vehicles (EVs) offer several advantages:

They produce zero emissions, reducing air pollution.
EVs are cost-effective as electricity is cheaper than fuel.
They require less maintenance due to fewer moving parts.
EVs are environmentally friendly and help reduce dependence on fossil fuels.
